title: ditassa linearis
intro: Ditassa linearis is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. It is native to tropical regions and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties. Ditassa linearis can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its health benefits, making it a valuable herbal remedy in many cultures.
